title: bonnaya veronicifolia var. grandiflora
intro: Bonnaya veronicifolia var. grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered Bonnaya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. In herbal preparations, Bonnaya veronicifolia var. grandiflora is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
